summary: Replayed ADR 0260 from the refreshed mainline release 0.177.92 using committed source eab22d2560767573b15334ceaf073d929eb0e451, re-verifying repo-managed Nextcloud on docker-runtime-lv3, its dedicated PostgreSQL backend on postgres-lv3, the shared cloud.lv3.org publication on nginx-lv3, and the synchronized recovery paths for stale compose networks, Docker bridge chains, detached local OpenBao publication, and concurrent Docker interruptions during mutable OCC convergence.

verification.observed: `ALLOW_IN_PLACE_MUTATION=true make live-apply-service service=nextcloud env=production` succeeded from committed source `eab22d2560767573b15334ceaf073d929eb0e451` with final recap `docker-runtime-lv3 : ok=181 changed=7 failed=0 skipped=106`, `nginx-lv3 : ok=39 changed=2 failed=0 skipped=7`, `postgres-lv3 : ok=52 changed=0 failed=0 skipped=14`, and `localhost : ok=18 changed=0 failed=0 skipped=3`.

verification.check: Public Nextcloud status and DAV redirects
verification.observed: `curl --max-time 20 -fsS https://cloud.lv3.org/status.php` returned `{"installed":true,"maintenance":false,"versionstring":"33.0.1"...}`, and `curl --max-time 20 -fsSI https://cloud.lv3.org/.well-known/caldav` plus `curl --max-time 20 -fsSI https://cloud.lv3.org/.well-known/carddav` both returned `HTTP/2 301` with `location: https://cloud.lv3.org/remote.php/dav/`.

Using the managed Proxmox jump path, `curl --max-time 20 -fsS http://10.10.10.20:8084/status.php` returned `installed=true`, `maintenance=false`, and `versionstring=33.0.1`; `docker compose --file /opt/nextcloud/docker-compose.yml ps` kept `nextcloud-app` published on `0.0.0.0:8084->80/tcp`; `occ config:app:get core backgroundjobs_mode` returned `cron`; and `occ user:info ops --output=json` reported `cloud_id=ops@cloud.lv3.org`, `enabled=true`, and `groups=["admin"]`.

Follow-up `docker inspect ... .State.Health` checks on `nextcloud-redis` and `nextcloud-openbao-agent` both reported `Status: healthy`, confirming the Redis and OpenBao sidecars settled after the synchronized replay.

`./scripts/validate_repo.sh agent-standards workstream-surfaces data-models generated-docs`, `uv run --with pyyaml python3 scripts/canonical_truth.py --check`, `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python3 scripts/live_apply_receipts.py --validate`, `uv run --with pyyaml --with jsonschema python3 scripts/platform_manifest.py --check`, `git diff --check`, and `make pre-push-gate` all passed on the final branch tree.

notes: This receipt supersedes `2026-03-29-adr-0260-nextcloud-personal-data-plane-mainline-live-apply` after origin/main advanced to release 0.177.91 and platform 0.130.60.
The synchronized replay justifies the platform version bump to 0.130.61 while repository version 0.177.92 records the refreshed exact-main release cut plus the committed OCC recovery hardening.

The shared OpenBao compose-env helper now recovers a detached local `lv3-openbao` publication before downstream runtime secret injection, and mutable OCC convergence now retries through managed runtime recovery when shared-host Docker churn interrupts `nextcloud-app`.
